S.FORM: O Wawa no Cidal (Holam: 太陽的孩子, ira ko ) cacey kamoko'ay a tilifi ega i Taywan. Misanga' 一期一會影像製作 ci ina to tilifi ega. Mipasadak to 2015 a miheca. Mianingaya a patingso^
S.PHON: o~u wawa no~u ʦiɬ~ɮaɾ (ħo~uɾam: *****, ira ko~u ) ʦaʦəj kamo~uko~uʡaj a tiɾifi ə*a i tajwan. misaŋaʡ ******** ʦi ina to~u tiɾifi ə*a. mipasaɬ~ɮak to~u **** a miħəʦa. mianiŋaja a patiŋso~uʔ
S.FORM: O Wawa no Cidal (Holam: 太陽的孩子, ira ko ) cacey kamoko'ay a tilifi ega i Taywan. Misanga' 一期一會影像製作 ci ina to tilifi ega. Mipasadak to 2015 a miheca. Mianingaya a patingso^
S.PHON: o~u wawa no~u ʦiɬ~ɮaɾ (ħo~uɾam: *****, ira ko~u ) ʦaʦəj kamo~uko~uʡaj a tiɾifi ə*a i tajwan. misaŋaʡ ******** ʦi ina to~u tiɾifi ə*a. mipasaɬ~ɮak to~u **** a miħəʦa. mianiŋaja a patiŋso~uʔ
